headline: US Names 6 Air Heroes 💀🛩️ in Iraq Fuel-Boom 💥 KC-135 Crash
text:
Uncle Sam 🇺🇸💪 DROPS the NAMES 📜😢 on SIX BADASS CREW 🛩️👨‍✈️💔 KIA in KC-135 Stratotanker TANKER-TANGO 💦🔥 CRASH 😱💥 over western Iraq 🏜️📍! John Klinner 🪖33 Bama Boy 🐘, Ariana Savino 👩‍✈️31 DC Diva 🏛️, Ashley Pruitt 💃34 KY Queen 🐎, Seth Koval 🦸38 IN Ironman 🏭, Curtis Angst 😤30 OH Buckeye 🔥, Tyler Simmons 🧑28 OH Homie 🏈 – FIRST THREE Air Force alphas 🦅, LAST TRIO National Guard GIGACHADS 🛡️! No enemy zap 🚫🎯 or blue-on-blue 🤡, probs MID-AIR SMASH-UP 🤜🛩️💨 sez Pete Hegseth 🎖️👨‍💼, hailing 'EM as 'MERICA HEROES 🦸‍♂️🦸‍♀️🇺🇸 – RIP legends, you flew STRAIGHT TO VALHALLA ⚔️🍻!

Bird was BRRRR-ing 🛩️💨 on COMBAT MISSION 🎯 vs Iran mullahs 🕌😡 in ongoing OP AGAINST TEHRAN TERROR 👹, one of TWO planes – bro landed SAFE 🟢👍 while this one YEETED into dirt near Turaibil border 🛑🇮🇶🇯🇴! Centcom: Friendly skies ✅, but pro-Iran goons 🧨🤝 claiming MISSILE MAGIC 🪄💥 on state TV 📺😂 – CBS tea ☕: Iraqi spies whispering COLLISION CHAOS 🔍❓. War kicked off Feb 28 🚀🇺🇸🇮🇱💣 on Iran, NOW US toll at 13 KIA 😭 (6 Kuwait BBQ 🔥, 1 Saudi sizzle 🥓), FOUR birds DOWN 🛩️💀 total – remember those F-15s 🦅 shot by FRIENDLIES over Kuwait? Pilots YEETED OUT like pros 🪂😂!

Boeing's vintage 1950s KC-135 🛢️👴 the OG FLYING GAS STATION ⛽🛩️ letting fighters GO LONG 🏃‍♂️💨 without pit stops 🛑 – backbone of air refuel ORGY 💦✈️! Iran simps SALTY 🧂😭, Hegseth like 'HEROES FOREVER 🫡' while probes probe 📡. Pro-Iran militias lurking west Iraq like cockroaches 🪳🚫, but US skies STILL OURS 🇺🇸🦅 – no bubble burst here, just tragic TANKER TUMBLE 💥😢! Wall Street? Nah, this is WALL of HONOR 🧱🙏 for fallen flyboys & flygirls SLAYING from above 👼🛩️‼️
